creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 200956
Fix MLD refcounting in IPv6 code.

Hi,

Please test this patch while watching:

vmstat -m | grep multi

Thank you!

--HPS

Simple leak provoking script:

#!/bin/sh

while true; do
ifconfig mce0 inet6 fe80::15
sleep 1
vmstat -m | grep multi
done
